match_name: Argentina vs France - World Cup Final rematch
description: Join thousands of passionate Albiceleste and Les Bleus fans for a giant screen experience at the iconic JLN Stadium Ground! High quality sound, food stalls, and an electrifying atmosphere.

match_name: Brazil vs Germany - Classic Football Screening
description: Experience the ultimate football rivalry by the beach. Fort Kochi Vasco Da Gama Square will host the screening under the stars. Free entry for all. Food trucks available.

address: Round South, Kuruppam, Thekkinkadu Maidan, Thrissur, Kerala 680001
description: Thrissur's favorite gathering spot hosts the Iberian Derby! Watch Ronaldo and Portugal take on Spain's tiki-taka on a 40ft LED wall. Rainproof seating provided.

match_name: England vs Italy - European Giants Clash
address: Town Hall Rd, Palace Road, Thrissur, Kerala 680020
description: An indoor screening event at the Thrissur Town Hall. Premium seating, high-fidelity audio system, and halftime commentary by local football legends.

match_name: Brazil vs Argentina - Superclásico de las Américas
description: The heart of Kerala football: Kozhikode Beach. A massive screening event expected to draw thousands. Experience the intense rivalry with the ocean breeze in the background.
Set in the beautiful Mananchira Square, watch the neighborly battle of European heavyweights. Safe family environment, seating arrangements, and local Malabar refreshments.

match_name: Croatia vs Morocco - World Cup Rematch
address: Sooryakanthi Rd, Kanaka Nagar, Nanthancodu, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala 695033
description: Screening of the heavyweights under the lights at the historic Kanakakkunnu Palace grounds. Organized by Trivandrum Football Club. Stalls, face-painting, and jerseys.
A majestic coastal screening at Shanghumukham Beach. Watch two World Cup champions collide on a massive seaside screen. Ample parking and sea-facing seating.
Relive the historic rivalry between Uruguay and Ghana! Kottayam's Nehru Stadium hosts a grand screening event with high-intensity music, merchandise counters, and local snacks.
Watch the orange army face the blue-and-white in the historic Thirunakkara Ground. Grand seating capacity, multi-angle surround sound, and local football discussions at halftime.
